tasks.objective: Clone https://github.com/Nivesh353/test-agent-2 and refactor the entire codebase: async/await, input validation, named constants, dead code removal, JSDoc comments

steps.description: Cloned repo and audited all files. Repository contains only agent config/markdown files: agent.yaml, README.md, RULES.md, SOUL.md, INSTRUCTIONS.md — no JavaScript/TypeScript source code present.
